FCW453_FCW_0101_02.00.06.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 75D
Recv ID: 77D
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 24
Func Name: ACC

[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "037",
    "soft": "0101",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]
